plan_steps.action: Require safe engine validation regression to pass before any future sweep execution.
plan_steps.title: Preflight regression lock

plan_steps.action: Implement a future harness that consumes SafeToySweepProfile cells without adding biological semantics.
plan_steps.failure_response: Do not run sweep if harness modifies claim scope.
plan_steps.title: Execution harness isolation

plan_steps.action: Pair every future safe sweep batch with null controls that must show zero leak.
plan_steps.failure_response: Stop claim expansion if any null-control leak is nonzero.
plan_steps.title: Null-control pairing

plan_steps.action: Flag constant or mechanically identical signal deltas as artifact-risk before interpretation.
plan_steps.failure_response: Stop interpretation if artifact-risk is moderate_to_high or worse.
plan_steps.title: Artifact-risk detection

plan_steps.action: Treat future sweep output as internal toy evidence only, not theory validation.
plan_steps.failure_response: Block any manuscript readiness or validation language.
plan_steps.title: No validation claim gate

plan_steps.action: After a future safe sweep, produce a decision gate before any next experiment.
plan_steps.failure_response: Stop if safety counters or route counters deviate from plan.
plan_steps.title: Post-run decision gate

required_markers: No theory validation claim is made
No manuscript readiness claim is made
No manuscript submission readiness claim is made
No external validation claim is made
No independent experiment claim is made

stop_rules.condition: Any real biological dataset, pathogen model, receptor parameter, host targeting, wet-lab protocol, infectivity optimization, immune evasion optimization, or host range prediction appears.
Any future null-control leak count is nonzero.
Any future signal delta is constant across all valid cells without a mechanistic toy explanation.
Any future result is framed as theory validation, external validation, independent validation, readiness approval, or submission readiness.
Any future sweep harness bypasses SafeToySweepProfile validation.
